title: Class 0 E005 fall emergency scenario
description: Deterministic scenario skeleton for a representative E005-aligned fall-detected emergency path. This file is an integration asset and must remain aligned with frozen assets under common/. E005 may be reached directly from fall evidence or during Class 2 clarification if the user confirms a fall/emergency condition or new deterministic fall evidence arrives.

steps.description: Publish an E005 fall-detected emergency payload through the registry-aligned emergency ingress plane or a controlled bridge that produces policy-router-compatible input.
Observe the verification-safe audit stream and capture the emergency routing outcome.

class2_transition_reference.required_condition: During Class 2 clarification, the user/caregiver confirms fall or emergency help, or deterministic fall evidence arrives from the emergency evidence path. The transition remains policy-driven and must not be triggered by LLM candidate text alone.
class2_transition_reference.prohibited_shortcut: LLM guidance or candidate prompt text must not independently trigger E005 or Class 0 emergency handling.

notes: Dedicated E005 fall-detected payload fixture now available in sample_policy_router_input_class0_e005_fall.json.
This scenario validates fall-detected event trigger semantics and is aligned with the required experiments document's canonical emergency family coverage.
Class 0 emergency handling must not use the LLM as the primary decision path.
During Class 2 clarification, E005 can be reached only through user/caregiver emergency confirmation or deterministic fall evidence.
doorbell_detected is not emergency evidence and does not authorize doorlock control.
